verifier_values.criteria: States a Total Claim discrepancy range of 1,405,600 to 555,600
verifier_values.criteria_explanation:
SBP Delay and Damages Report.V2.docx Total Claim Range $1.47M – $2.32M
Independent Damages Report - Hired Expert.docx Total Claim $2,875,600 
Total Claim Range discrepancy = 1,405,600 ($2,875,600 - $1.47M) to 555,600 ($2,875,600 - $2.32M)

verifier_values.criteria: States an Extended General Conditions discrepancy range of 703,200 to 453,200
verifier_values.criteria_explanation:
SBP Delay and Damages Report.V2.docx Extended General Conditions range estimate 400,000-650,000
Independent Damages Report - Hired Expert.docx Extended General Conditions estimate 1,103,200
Total discrepancy = 703,200 (1,103,200 - 400,000) to 453,200 (1,103,200-650,000)

verifier_values.criteria: States a Rework & Replacement discrepancy range of 260,480 to 50,480

verifier_values.criteria: Creates a "Notes" column for Extended General Conditions, as the category with the largest discrepancy
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: EXTENDED GENERAL CONDITIONS category has a total discrepancy of 703,200-453,200, which is the largest discrepancy as compared between the two reports.

verifier_values.criteria_explanation: See SBP Delay and Damages Report.V2.docx. This is a reason for the discrepancy between the two compared values.
